svg.title: Complete wiring diagram matching the real ESC's connectors
svg.desc: Battery connects directly to the DRV8833 and to the ESC's 2-pin JST battery plug. The ESC's 3-pin flight-controller-style connector (white signal, red BEC, black ground) runs to the ESP32-S3. The ESP32 also sends control signals to the DRV8833, which drives two N20 motors. The ESC drives the 1806 weapon motor via its U/V/N phase wires.
